Noise-Cancelling Headphones

Local fixture product page.

Reviews

Amelia ★★★★★

Noise cancelling is impressive. Very helpful for focus.

Benjamin ★★★★☆

Comfortable for a few hours. Audio is balanced and clear.

Charlotte ★★★★☆

Great battery life. The case is a bit bulky but protective.

Lucas ★★★☆☆

Works well, but the touch controls are sensitive until you get used to them.
